notes.title: C3-PO joins Droid Archives
notes.summary: C3-PO has been added as a new iconic Worker droid.
changes: Added C3-PO as an iconic Worker droid.
C3-PO provides 25%/s income while placed in a productive station.
Added his Companion passive: 2x Droid Sell Value.
Added support for update popups and patch notes.

todo.text: Add C3-PO iconic droid and patch notes.
